overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a survival horror game showing a character in a green jacket exploring a dark, decaying apartment interior. The character moves from a kitchen area toward a foggy balcony doorway, then turns and proceeds through a damaged living space with peeling wallpaper and a flashlight illuminating the surroundings.

small white microwave sitting on a stand
tall white refrigerator with freezer compartment on top
square ceramic tiles behind the stove

segments.scene_description: The character stands in a narrow, dimly lit kitchen with wooden cabinets and vintage white appliances. A flashlight illuminates the tiled backsplash and gas stove while the character observes the surroundings.

scene_state.functional_zone: balcony doorway with foggy exterior view

events.description: character walks from the kitchen interior toward the balcony doorway revealing foggy exterior

wrought iron balcony railing visible through the doorway
thick white fog visible outside the balcony

segments.scene_description: The character moves from the kitchen toward an open balcony doorway, revealing a foggy exterior. The refrigerator passes to the left side as the metal railing and thick fog become visible through the door.

scene_state.functional_zone: decaying living room with damaged walls and peeling wallpaper

events.description: character turns away from the balcony and walks deeper into the apartment interior

agents.ego_description: turning away from the balcony and walking through the decaying room with damaged walls and ceiling

entered.detail: tall window with wooden frame letting in diffuse light
white metal radiator beneath the window
exposed wooden beam crossing the ceiling
severely peeling wallpaper hanging from the walls
old ceiling fan with damaged blades hanging overhead
dark doorway leading to another room

segments.scene_description: Turning away from the balcony, the character enters a decaying living space with peeling wallpaper, a damaged ceiling fan, and exposed wooden beams. The flashlight reveals a radiator beneath a window and a dark doorway ahead as the character explores the deteriorating apartment.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a decaying apartment that shifts from a cramped, dimly lit kitchen to a desolate, open living space. It begins within the narrow confines of a kitchen, where a flashlight illuminates vintage white appliances and a tiled backsplash. As the character moves forward, the scene opens toward a balcony doorway, passing a refrigerator to reveal a thick, oppressive fog clinging to the exterior metal railing. Turning away from the mist, the camera then glides into a deteriorating living area characterized by peeling wallpaper and exposed wooden beams. The movement concludes as the flashlight sweeps across a radiator beneath a window and a damaged ceiling fan before heading toward a dark, looming doorway.
